Package uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.audio

package uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.audio
Audio hardware management and processing utilities.

Provides the domain model for audio devices and the necessary utilities for recording and playback across different host operating systems.

    AudioDevice
    Represents a stable, model-agnostic descriptor for an audio device.
    AudioDevice.Type
